speaker: Speaker 01
text: Thank you for calling TechSupport, my name is Sarah. How can I help you today?

speaker: Speaker 00
text: Hi Sarah, I am having trouble logging into my account. It keeps saying invalid password.

speaker: Speaker 01
text: I am sorry to hear that. Can I please have your registered email address?

speaker: Speaker 01
text: Thank you John. I can see your account here. It looks like your account was locked after multiple failed login attempts.

speaker: Speaker 00
text: Oh no, I really need access urgently. I have an important meeting in an hour.

speaker: Speaker 01
text: I completely understand how urgent this is. I will unlock your account right now and send a password reset link to your email.

speaker: Speaker 00
text: That would be amazing, thank you so much!

speaker: Speaker 01
text: Done! I have unlocked your account and the reset link has been sent. Please check your inbox in the next 2 minutes.

speaker: Speaker 00
text: I got the email and I am back in. You are a lifesaver, thank you Sarah!

speaker: Speaker 01
text: You are very welcome! Is there anything else I can help you with today?

speaker: Speaker 00
text: No that is all. You were very helpful, have a great day!

speaker: Speaker 01
text: Thank you for calling TechSupport. Have a wonderful day goodbye!
